Yes I will be doing a Conversation with her. From the Google internet:
Joanne Paul is a writer, broadcaster, consultant, and Honorary Senior Lecturer in Intellectual History at the University of Sussex. A BBC/AHRC New Generation Thinker, her research focuses on the intellectual and cultural history of the Renaissance and Early Modern periods...
She has a new book out [Thomas More: A Life](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5f2303a71558ea0c6238297190c7a00d1eb915c92c91bf1d2e1e015bdfebf790&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91991&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=0e562e73542bdcea5105c187f4d318d0&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=190ec81883f38b7593ac525790fb881c).
Here is [her home page](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=17996e793ddf5145aaf434121f5fbecdf97a7ddff46c5824490eac58501fee9e&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91991&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=6cd120cab3c2cbe4b9aab76b0825ac70&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9qb2FubmVwYXVsLmNvbS8&email_id=190ec81883f38b7593ac525790fb881c). Here is [Joanne on Twitter](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f77d300cb3d6390ad8980ff087c2beebd1b7f837391fcf04b1db2109ad163f21&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91991&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=8ea31f7046728817a9e868a469c866a8&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9Kb2FubmVfUGF1bF8&email_id=190ec81883f38b7593ac525790fb881c). She has [many videos on the Tudor period](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6c4509d296d4b28f8f761cfc32826acd2686fe4675b3066e0d2af04c650affee&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91991&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=10115204706d0ae4f7cbdc5e7e18a94d&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=190ec81883f38b7593ac525790fb881c), some with over one million views.
So what should I ask her?
